center.name: 蓬塔阿雷纳斯
center.summary: 蓬塔阿雷纳斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Brown-hooded gull，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown-hooded gull (Chroicocephalus maculipennis) is a species of gull, found in South America in Argentina, southeastern Brazil, Chile, Uruguay, and in the South Atlantic Ocean on the Falkland Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown-hooded gull (Chroicocephalus maculipennis) is a species of gull, found in South America in Argentina, southeastern Brazil, Chile, Uruguay, and in the South Atlantic Ocean on the Falkland Islands
